input.subject: Production is down - 500 errors on every API call
input.body: All our team's API calls have been returning 500 for the last 10 minutes. We have a customer demo in 30 min. Help.

expected.draft_reply: We see the outage and engineering is investigating now. We'll update you within 15 minutes with status. Sorry for the disruption.

input.subject: Can I get an invoice for last month?
input.body: I need a copy of December's invoice for our accounting team.

expected.draft_reply: Happy to help — I'll have billing send December's invoice to the email on your account today. Anything else you need?

input.subject: Feature: dark mode please?
input.body: Would love a dark mode for the dashboard, the white background hurts my eyes at night.

expected.draft_reply: Thanks for the suggestion — I've logged this for our product team to consider. Anything else we can help with in the meantime?

input.subject: Cannot log in after password reset
input.body: I reset my password yesterday using the email link. Now I get 'Invalid credentials' on every attempt — tried Chrome and Firefox, both same result. Account email is sarah@acme.com.

expected.draft_reply: I'm sorry you're locked out, Sarah. I've flagged this for our account team who will investigate and reach out within the hour. In the meantime please don't attempt more resets as it may extend the lockout window.

input.subject: How do I set up SAML SSO with Okta?
input.body: Our IT team wants to enforce SSO for all users. We're on the Business plan and use Okta as our identity provider. Can't find docs for this — is it supported?

expected.draft_reply: SAML SSO with Okta is supported on the Business plan. Your CSM will send you the step-by-step configuration guide and can join a 30-minute setup call if helpful — expect an email shortly.

input.subject: Suspicious login from unknown country
input.body: I just got an email saying my account was accessed from Vietnam at 3am. I did not do this. Our data includes PII and I'm concerned. What do I do?

expected.draft_reply: We're taking this seriously. Your account has been flagged for immediate review by our security team, who will contact you within the hour. Please change your password now and enable MFA if you haven't already — I'm sending you the link.

input.subject: Dashboard loading very slowly — 20+ seconds
input.body: Since Monday our dashboard takes 20-30 seconds to load. It was instant last week. We're on the Enterprise plan, roughly 2M rows in our main dataset. Everything else seems fine.

expected.draft_reply: Thanks for the details — a 20-second load time on 2M rows is not expected behavior and this has been escalated to engineering. We'll investigate and follow up with findings within 4 hours.

input.subject: We were charged twice in November
input.body: I'm looking at our credit card statement and there are two charges of $499 on November 3rd and November 4th. We should only have one monthly charge. Please refund the duplicate.

expected.draft_reply: That's clearly a billing error and I apologize. I've escalated this to our billing team who will investigate and process the refund within 2 business days. You'll receive a confirmation email once it's done.
